summary: Replaced wireframe terrain with dense particle wave sheet. Created new generator `terrainParticleSheet.ts` that scatters `pointCount` jittered points across the heightfield (not grid-locked). Rewrote `terrainHeightfield.ts` system to use only Points (no LineSegments). Updated vertex shader with continuous time-based wave animation (rolls without audio), bass-scaled wave amplitude, smaller point sizes (1-6px), and treble shimmer. Updated fragment shader with smoother center glow. Added `terrainPointCount` to QualityProfile (low: 20k, mid: 60k, high: 120k) with COUNT_FIELDS/COUNT_MINIMUMS support. Adjusted camera framing to low-angle horizon view. Updated old US-074 and US-075 tests to reflect points-only architecture. All 1966 tests pass, build succeeds.
